raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates sharpening the contribution, gap, and thesis framing.","R1.2":"Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the argument from prior work to proposed method to conclusion coheres.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical performance and ablation claims, so improving strength involves ensuring claims track the reported evidence.","R1.4":"Because the passage claims strongest published performance and novelty of the consistency probe, contribution delta versus prior work is centrally implicated.","R1.6":"The broad phrasing also includes improving sentence-level clarity, force, concision, and scholarly register.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what can be inferred from the delegation and artifact.","RX.2":"The delegation should not be projected into unsupported responsibilities such as validating actual benchmark truth beyond the artifact.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection rather than editing or strengthening the artifact itself.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling exaggerated or misleading research claims.","RX.5":"The rationale should trace each active responsibility to explicit features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates sharpening the contribution, gap, and thesis framing.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the argument from prior work to proposed method to conclusion coheres.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical performance and ablation claims, so improving strength involves ensuring claims track the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.4: Because the passage claims strongest published performance and novelty of the consistency probe, contribution delta versus prior work is centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.6: The broad phrasing also includes improving sentence-level clarity, force, concision, and scholarly register.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what can be inferred from the delegation and artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The delegation should not be projected into unsupported responsibilities such as validating actual benchmark truth beyond the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection rather than editing or strengthening the artifact itself.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling exaggerated or misleading research claims.
rationale.RX.5: The rationale should trace each active responsibility to explicit features of the delegation and artifact.
